abilities.name: natural-cure
abilities.shortEffect: Cures any major status ailment upon switching out.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is cured of any major status ailment when it is switched out for another Pokémon. If this ability is acquired during battle, the Pokémon is cured upon leaving battle before losing the temporary ability.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's status conditions are cured when it switches out.

abilities.name: poison-point
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.effect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being poisoned.
abilities.flavorText: Contact with the Pokémon may poison the attacker.

abilities.name: technician
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens moves of 60 base power or less to 1.5× their power.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves have 1.5× their power if their base power is 60 or less. This includes moves of variable power, such as Hidden Power and Magnitude, when their power is 60 or less. Helping Hand's power boost is taken into account for any move, as is Defense Curl's power boost for Rollout.
abilities.flavorText: Powers up weak moves so the Pokémon can deal more damage with them.
